differential_diagnoses: Rheumatoid arthritis with secondary vasculitic neuropathy
next_steps: Perform serologic testing for Rheumatoid Arthritis (RF and anti-CCP) and Sjogren's syndrome (anti-SSA and anti-SSB)
Perform serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation to evaluate for monoclonal gammopathy
Repeat MRI of the cervical and lumbar spine with adequate sedation or analgesic coverage
Consider sural nerve and muscle biopsy if serologic workup is non-diagnostic
Formal dietary and nutritional consultation to determine the etiology of the severe B6 deficiency
